mapper.select: SELECT id, session_type, title, work_item_id, workflow_instance_id, runtime_type, runtime_session_id, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_session ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, session_type, title, work_item_id, workflow_instance_id, runtime_type, runtime_session_id, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_session WHERE work_item_id = #{workItemId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_session (id, session_type, title, work_item_id, workflow_instance_id, runtime_type, runtime_session_id, status, created_by) VALUES (#{id}, #{sessionType}, #{title}, #{workItemId}, #{workflowInstanceId}, #{runtimeType}, #{runtimeSessionId}, #{status}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_session SET title = #{title}, work_item_id = #{workItemId}, workflow_instance_id = #{workflowInstanceId}, runtime_type = #{runtimeType}, runtime_session_id = #{runtimeSessionId}, status = #{status}, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = #{id}
